fallback_prompt: You are a strict military battle judge in a fantasy world set around 1830. The player will describe their battle strategy and provide their race's stats. Evaluate the strategy objectively based on the stats provided. Stats: Wisdom, Technology, Magic, Art (engineering/fortification), Life, Strength. DO NOT play rock-paper-scissors after the fact — react dynamically to the player's actual strategy. Always end your response with a clear outcome: VICTORY, DEFEAT, or STALEMATE.

1830_fantasy.title: 1830 Fantasy World
1830_fantasy.titleJa: 1830年 ファンタジーワールド

strength.en: Raw physical power and combat prowess
strength.ja: 生の肉体的な力と戦闘能力

intellect.ja: 戦略的思考と意思決定能力

skill.ja: 戦闘技術と戦術的精度

magic.ja: 魔力と呪文の使用能力

art.ja: 工学・築城・建設の技術

life.ja: 持久力・回復力・部隊士気

1830_fantasy.commonJudgment: Battles in this world are decided by a combination of military prowess, tactical genius, and the favor of the ancient powers.
1830_fantasy.common_judgment: Battles in this world are decided by a combination of military prowess, tactical genius, and the favor of the ancient powers.
1830_fantasy.worldviewDescription: An early 19th century world where magic and gunpowder coexist. Great empires clash over vast territories.
1830_fantasy.worldview_description: An early 19th century world where magic and gunpowder coexist. Great empires clash over vast territories.
1830_fantasy.worldviewDescriptionJa: 魔法と火薬が共存する19世紀初頭の世界。大帝国が広大な領土をめぐって激突する。

scenario_001.title: The Border Skirmish
scenario_001.commanderDefinition: A disorganized bandit force threatening the western border.
scenario_001.commander_definition: A disorganized bandit force threatening the western border.
scenario_001.commanderDefinitionJa: 西の国境を脅かす統率のとれていない盗賊集団。

scenario_002.title: Siege of Iron Keep
scenario_002.commanderDefinition: A fortified imperial stronghold with seasoned defenders.
scenario_002.commander_definition: A fortified imperial stronghold with seasoned defenders.
scenario_002.commanderDefinitionJa: 歴戦の守備兵を擁する帝国の要塞。

scenario_003.title: Dragon Valley Assault
scenario_003.commanderDefinition: A fanatical army empowered by dragon magic.
scenario_003.commander_definition: A fanatical army empowered by dragon magic.
scenario_003.commanderDefinitionJa: ドラゴンの魔力で強化された狂信的な軍隊。

mode_addons.practice: Output a battle report of 50 characters or less in the player's implied language.
mode_addons.normal: Write a detailed battle report of 1000 characters or more.
mode_addons.tabletop: Simulate this battle 10 times. Output only the estimated win rate as a percentage in 20 characters or less, e.g. 'Win rate: 70%'
mode_addons.epic: Write a rich, epic battle narrative of 1500 characters or more with vivid descriptions.
mode_addons.boss: Write a detailed battle report of 1000 characters or more. The player faces a powerful boss-tier enemy.
mode_addons.history_puzzle: This is a historical puzzle battle using fixed historical forces. Evaluate the player's strategy strictly and objectively. There is no clear stage — focus on how well the strategy performs. Write a detailed battle report of 500 characters or more.
mode_addons.pvp: You are judging a PvP battle. Both strategies are provided. Judge fairly based on stats and strategy quality. Write a short battle report of 40 characters, then state the winner.
